title: mannequin focus — full Verlet/IK/WebSocket/walk system
description:
## Summary

Continues and extends the brett mannequin work from PR #748, delivering the complete interactive 3D figure system end-to-end.

### Commits included (~16 unique)

- **Scaffold & scene** (`7275e514`, `086dde5f`): New mannequin-focus UI shell + empty Three.js scene with floor and orbit controls
- **Mannequin builder** (`e5b86069`): Named bones and contact spheres for full-body figure representation
- **Pose presets** (`ff127b66`): Six preset poses with immediate apply
- **Verlet spring** (`7af7ce7e`): Gravity-blended stiffness spring physics
- **Stiffness slider** (`727247b1`): UI slider wired to live spring state
- **CCD-IK** (`a883fc61`): Contact-sphere drag with CCD inverse kinematics and override/resume logic
- **Click/tab/delete management** (`a56658ab`): Full figure selection, tab-cycling, and delete handling
- **WASD walk system** (`8c17abea`): Click-to-walk + WASD controls with leg/arm swing animation
- **WebSocket sync** (`de4ad89f`): Real-time sync for figures, presets, IK targets, walk state, and stiffness across clients
- **Server-side stiffness sync** (`cc2dd611`): Server broadcasts stiffness updates; art-library mount removed
- **Art-library removal** (`fa6ca420`): Pruned legacy art-library SVG assets and index backup
- **Mock-db + test fixes** (`c99d0b28`): Global STATE exposure, mock-db for unit tests, stiffness in unit test suite
- **Spec & plan docs** (`1cb5b690`, `eb3c0ad5`): Design spec and implementation plan committed to docs/

### What this delivers

A fully operational 3D mannequin system for systemic constellation coaching sessions on brett.localhost / brett.<domain>: figures can be placed, posed, moved via WASD or click-to-walk, IK-dragged by contact spheres, and all state is synchronized in real time over WebSocket to every connected client.

## Test plan

- [ ] `task brett:deploy ENV=mentolder` — verify rollout succeeds
- [ ] Open brett in two browser tabs — place a figure, confirm it appears on both
- [ ] Drag a contact sphere — verify CCD-IK updates and syncs
- [ ] Press WASD / click floor — verify walk animation and position sync
- [ ] Apply a pose preset — verify immediate apply and WS broadcast
- [ ] Move stiffness slider — verify spring behavior changes and syncs
- [ ] `task test:unit` — confirm mock-db unit tests pass

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
